summary: Comprehensive testing of BILL4PE Corporate B2B feature (employees, invites, approvals, company wallet, role-based access). All 21 pytest backend cases passed (100%) and full Playwright UI smoke-flow (admin register → /app/company → KPIs → add employee with temp-password modal → invite with link modal → approvals empty-state → wallet recharge ₹0 → ₹500 → bottom nav 'Company' visible) all succeeded.

issues: Plan label renders as 'Plan: monthly · 50 employees · trial' — the underscore-split is okay but the literal word 'employees' is appended regardless of plan key; minor copy polish

action_items: Optional copy polish: improve the subscription-plan label formatter on CompanyDashboard.jsx so the literal 'employees' suffix is conditional on plan having a seat-tier prefix.
critical_code_review_comments: company.py _require_admin() correctly returns 403 for individuals and employees — verified via tests.

bills.py correctly gates employee bills on approval_status=='approved' and debits the COMPANY wallet (₹5) when role=employee+company_id present; verified balance delta = -5.00 and 402 fallback when wallet < 5.
auth.py register creates a 'companies' doc with wallet_balance=0, employee_limit, plan, subscription_status='trial' and sets user.role='admin', user.company_id — confirmed via GET /api/auth/me.
expenses.py create_expense sets approval_status='pending' only for role=='employee' with company_id (admins get 'approved'). Good.
CompanyDashboard.jsx is large (~740 lines) — consider splitting Employees/Approvals/Wallet sub-components into their own files for maintainability.
Register page is missing data-testid attributes (reg-name, reg-email, etc.) — fallback selectors worked but adding them improves robustness for future tests.
Invite token consumption is correct (404 on re-lookup after accept). Expiry check uses ISO string compare which is okay since both are UTC isoformat.
test_credentials: Phone OTP: 9999999999 / 123456. Corporate admin created per run: admin_<ts>@democorp.com / test123 (user_type=corporate, corporate_name='Demo Co').
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates a fresh corporate admin and multiple employees (TEST prefix-like timestamped emails). No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_corporate_b2b.py (21 cases, ~7s runtime). Earlier suite /app/backend/tests/test_bill4pe_v2.py and test_refactor_regression.py still exist. The frontend register page uses placeholder-based inputs (no reg-* data-testids); the Playwright flow used the corporate toggle button + email/password/name selectors via fallback. All Company UI elements use proper data-testids as documented in CompanyDashboard.jsx.
rca of the issue: No issues found — Corporate B2B feature works end-to-end across backend and frontend, including role-based access, approval gating, centralized company wallet billing, and employee-limit enforcement.
